51:
“There's few so loath to take their rest
Than 'venturers without a quest,
For shorn of work to give them worth,
They soon become a source of mirth.”

“There's few so loath to take their rest
Than 'venturers without a quest,
For shorn of work to give them worth,
They soon become a source of mirth.”

52:
I see I've struck a chord with you, my friend. My colleagues tell me that if one in this land ever needs an item <Emphasis>fetched</Emphasis> that you are the <If(PlayerParameter(4))>woman<Else/>man</If> to speak to. I find this philanthropic compulsion fascinating, and so─in the interests of research into my next play, let's say─I seek to put said compulsion to the test...
Assuming you are game, of course.
